TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jensen_Ackles, title = Jensen_Ackles, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jensen_Ackles} }

S.FORM: Jensen Ackles kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 3, Jensen Ackles, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Jensen Ackles kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 3, Jensen Ackles, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *ens~ɕen aʦ~ʨkles~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *ens~ɕen aʦ~ʨkles~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
